summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloud Storage feature for InsureHub. All backend APIs (upload, list, download, delete) and frontend UI components working correctly for both Admin and HR users.
passed_tests: Admin login successful
HR login successful
Cloud Storage tab visible in Admin navigation at /admin/storage
Cloud Storage tab visible in HR navigation at /hr/storage
Cloud Storage page loads with 5 category tabs: Policy Terms, Endorsement Files, Premium Receipts, E-Cards, Others
API: POST /api/documents/upload?category=Policy%20Terms - uploads file successfully
API: POST /api/documents/upload?category=E-Cards - uploads file successfully
API: POST /api/documents/upload?category=Others - HR user can upload
API: GET /api/documents - returns list of documents
API: GET /api/documents?category=Premium%20Receipts - category filter works
API: GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/download - returns file content
API: DELETE /api/documents/{doc_id} - soft-deletes document
Upload requires authentication (401 without token)
List documents requires authentication
Download non-existent document returns 404
Delete non-existent document returns 404
File count badges show on tabs when files exist
Upload File button visible and functional
Download button visible in file table
Delete button visible in file table
Success toast notification on file upload
File table displays: File Name, Size, Uploaded By, Date, Actions
seed_data_creation: Test documents created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloud Storage feature fully tested. Uses Emergent Object Storage integration (real, not mocked). Backend endpoints at /api/documents/* work correctly. Frontend CloudStorage.js component renders properly with all 5 category tabs. Both Admin (/admin/storage) and HR (/hr/storage) routes work. File upload, download, and delete all functional.
